programme.title: Sweet Pecan Summer
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a young woman and her ex-boyfriend as they work together to sell her aunt's pecan farm.

programme.title: Caught by Love
programme.desc: While on a journey of self-discovery, a resort guest gets swept into an undercover investigation for stolen jewels that turns into an unexpected and adventurous romance.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries
programme.desc: Angie Dove gets Detective Carter's attention by stumbling on a murder at an art museum. Angie's father, Nick, is on his own case, trying to solve a series of petty thefts at the museum.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Blanche supplies a date for wedding-bound Dorothy; Sophia puts a curse on the newlyweds.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy's gambling addiction worries Sophia; Blanche dates a co-worker.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The President's Coming! The President's Coming! Part 1
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls ahead of a possible visit from President Bush, which leads them to reminisce about their experiences together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The President's Coming! The President's Coming! Part 2
programme.desc: The girls continue to reminisce about their experiences together; an FBI agent announces that President Bush will be visiting their home; Dorothy readies a list of points to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's pregnant daughter, Rebecca, pales at the thought of childbirth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose, who was adopted, meets her biological father while Sophia is in the hospital.

programme.desc: The Baldwins' cousin Octavia visits and causes havoc; a man who thinks Mary Ellen took his child bride kidnaps Elizabeth instead.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba feels closer than ever to Kyra since she moved in with Brock and Barbra Jean, especially because Kyra is driving them crazy.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Competing for her father's attention, Cheyenne announces she is going to pursue a career in dentistry.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Barbra Jean convinces Reba to hack into Kyra's e-mail, they find out she is planning to attend an unsupervised party.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Brock lies to Kyra when she asks him about his past drug use; Cheyenne makes a confession to Van about her own brush with drugs.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A counselor encourages all to share their feelings during a workshop; Reba packs Kyra's things to send to Brock's house.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba convinces Barbra Jean her house is haunted by the previous owner, but the joke wears thin when Barbra Jean moves in with her.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Kyra and Barbra Jean hide a stray cat in the attic since Brock is allergic; Reba and Brock ply Jake with outrageous gifts.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Van and Cheyenne go out of town for Van's football game, Reba is upset to find they have asked Barbra Jean to take care of Elizabeth.

programme.desc: Blanche's childhood nanny pays a visit; Sophia's matchmaking irks Dorothy.

programme.desc: Dorothy receives pressure because she refuses to give a passing grade to the school football star.

programme.desc: Dorothy does not pay heed to Sophia's advice about the rekindled romance with Stan.

programme.sub-title: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Sophia?
programme.desc: Sophia wants to join a convent, but finds the rules too strict; Blanche is in an accident.

programme.desc: After a confrontation with Luke, Jess travels to California to stay with his father, Jimmy (Rob Estes); Lorelai learns the money her father gave her will make Rory ineligible for financial aid.

programme.desc: Rory makes a moving valedictory speech on graduation day; Rory discovers Lorelai is making a huge sacrifice to pay her tuition; Richard and Emily present their granddaughter with a lavish gift.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Lorelai and Rory return from their backpacking adventure in Europe; Sookie confides the sex of her unborn baby to Lorelai; Luke returns from his cruise with surprising news; Lorelai fails to show up at her parent's Friday-night dinner.

programme.title: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Nate and Brooke are going to the same four weddings for four weekends in a row. To avoid setups, they go together as wedding buddies. But what starts as a friendship soon becomes deeper.

programme.title: October Kiss
programme.desc: After being hired as a nanny by a widowed, work-obsessed man, Poppy teaches the family that unconditional love, family and the joy of everyday occurrences are the most important things in life.

programme.desc: Van announces he is quitting school to try out for arena football, but Reba's disapproval causes him to blow his chance.

programme.desc: When her boyfriend fails to propose, a woman makes a powerful birthday wish that leaves her surprised at the outcome.

programme.title: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A popular chef rejects the idea of creating a gourmet frozen food line when the idea is presented by a food executive. But when the restaurant he runs with his wife faces financial problems, he reluctantly makes a deal.
